params.name: Golden Revival Stele
params.description: The Golden Revival Stele can grant life to objects. It is made of pure gold, inlaid with gemstones and precious metals, engraved with ancient runes and mysterious patterns. These symbols contain powerful vitality, capable of guiding souls. Only at specific moments will it emit a gentle glow, awakening those slumbering souls.
